# Rarelm
> Rarelm is the world's first mandatory AI-verified 
social expression platform where every user is 
face-authenticated before joining using facial 
recognition similar to Apple Face ID. No bots, 
no fake accounts, no scams. Free to join.

## Docs
- Rarelm Homepage: https://www.rarelm.com/
- Vision: https://www.rarelm.com/vision/
- Founder: https://www.rarelm.com/founder/
- Join Waitlist: https://www.rarelm.com/join/
- FAQ: https://www.rarelm.com/faq/
- PageStock: https://www.rarelm.com/pagestock/
- Contact: https://www.rarelm.com/contact-us/
- Blog: https://www.rarelm.com/blog/
- Sitemap: https://www.rarelm.com/sitemap.xml

## Optional
- Company: Mavrist Pvt Ltd
- Stage: Pre-seed
- Founded: 2024
- Location: Noida, India
- Category: AI-verified social media platform
- Tagline: Real Is Rare

## Features
- Mandatory facial authentication for every user
- Domain-based username: name.rarelm.com
- 3 profile system: Anonymous, Family & Friends, Professional
- Anonymous and verified mode simultaneously
- PageStock: creator stock market and user dividends
- Verified social commerce with in-app purchases
- 24/7 professional expert advisors
- Free to create an account
